plugins.name: ai-systems-coach
plugins.description: Critique a hand-drawn stock-flow / causal-loop diagram, identify the system archetype (Limits to Growth, Shifting the Burden, Fixes that Fail), and surface Meadows leverage points. Refuses to draw the diagram for you — drawing is the act of thinking.

plugins.name: ai-stockflow-builder
plugins.description: Commission an interactive stock-flow simulation web app from your AI coding agent (Claude Code or Codex). Three phases: readback with forced ≥1 disagreement, brief emission, hand-computed extraction test. Pass 1 enforces hard caps (1 stock / 2 flows / 2 params / ≤30 steps / linear only); Pass 2 extends. Optional Phase 0 interview mode for participants without a diagram.

plugins.name: leverage-finder
plugins.description: Map elements of a stock-flow model to Donella Meadows' 12 leverage points, ranked by potential impact for a stated goal. Refuses to invent stocks, flows, or parameters not in the model. Refuses to return a ranking without an explicit, measurable goal. Returns exactly 3 candidates with at least one at knob ≤5 (the asymmetry lesson).
